pi_items.source: Code execution and analysis of setup_task.sh which iterates through exactly 5 .eml files from assets/emails/spam
Code analysis of setup_task.sh showing that the email subjects are extracted and written to this explicit path
Code analysis of setup_task.sh configuring Thunderbird profiles using this directory path

privileged_info_summary: The environment dynamically injects exactly 5 authentic spam emails from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus into the Thunderbird Inbox located under Mail/Local Folders. The exact subjects are written to /home/ga/Desktop/spam_subjects.txt for the agent. The task verification confirms the email counts and the presence of these specific subjects in the Junk folder.
